variants.name: Original tagline
variants.content: 427 races scored on 15 criteria by human editors who ride them. Just the data and the road.

variants.name: Riders-who-ride phrasing
variants.content: 427 road races, scored on 15 criteria by people who actually ride them. Just the data and the road.

variants.name: Discipline-specific
variants.content: Every gran fondo, sportive, and hill climb worth your money — scored on 15 criteria, by hand.

variants.name: Hotel anchor
variants.content: Race-specific. Built for your target event. Less than your race hotel — $2/day.

variants.name: Gel anchor
variants.content: Race-specific. Built for your target event. $15/week. Less than one gel per ride.

variants.name: Entry fee anchor
variants.content: Race-specific. Built for your target event. Your entry fee was $175. Your plan is $2/day.

variants.name: Generic scarcity
variants.content: A human in your corner. Adapts week to week. Limited spots.

variants.name: Concrete number
variants.content: A human in your corner. Adapts week to week. 20 athletes/month.

variants.name: Opens quarterly
variants.content: A human in your corner. Adapts week to week. Opens quarterly.
